reasoning: The control CP-9 (5) focuses on ensuring backups are transferred to an alternate storage site. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that etcd, which stores the cluster state, and Kubernetes Secrets are backed up and that these backups are configured to be stored in a remote or alternate location. This aligns with the requirement to have system backups transferred to an alternate storage site.
title: System Backup | Transfer to Alternate Storage Site
